privileged_info_summary: The extract_http_objects task uses the real http.cap file from the official Wireshark Sample Captures repository (wiki.wireshark.org). This PCAP contains 43 packets with exactly 2 extractable HTTP objects: (1) download.html (18,070 bytes, MD5: 106f568b490fa6a2e3e441b84da4f699) from www.ethereal.com, and (2) a Google ads query file (3,608 bytes, MD5: 4c6193f665913ba36a60e29c54b308b8) from pagead2.googlesyndication.com. The task metadata paths are all correctly configured, and the ground truth directory is properly populated during setup using tshark extraction. The environment runs Wireshark 3.4.10 on ubuntu-gnome-systemd_highres with 4 CPU cores and 4GB RAM.
